email_subject: Application for Sales Advisor – Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear JobLink team,

I am writing to apply for the Sales Advisor position at the luxury jewelry company in Antwerp, as advertised on JobLink. With my first commercial experience in digital marketing and a strong customer-oriented mindset, I am confident I can contribute to your team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client relationships, analyze customer needs, and ensure high-quality service. I have also maintained social media channels and handled content coordination. I am a quick learner, team player, and comfortable working independently. My interest in jewelry and my polished appearance align with the role's requirements.

I am based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and speak Dutch at A2 level (actively improving). I am available for the start date of July 8, 2026.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Sales Advisor position at the luxury jewelry company in Antwerp, as posted by JobLink. With my background in digital marketing and direct customer interaction, I am eager to bring my enthusiasm, communication skills, and commercial awareness to your team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I work closely with clients to understand their needs, provide tailored solutions, and ensure satisfaction. This has honed my ability to analyze customer requests and deliver a personalized experience. I also maintain social media channels and create engaging content, which aligns with the task of managing social media for the jewelry brand. My experience in handling orders and tracking performance has prepared me for processing orders and following up on repairs.

I am a team player who thrives in collaborative environments, yet I can work independently when needed. I am leergierig (eager to learn) and have a genuine interest in jewelry, which will help me provide knowledgeable and enthusiastic service. I maintain a polished appearance and am comfortable in a customer-facing role. My Dutch is at A2 level and I am actively improving it through classes.

I am based in Zwijndrecht, just outside Antwerp, and am available for the start date of July 8, 2026. I am attracted to the offer of a permanent contract, internal training, and growth opportunities.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing how I can contribute to your team.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
First commercial experience in a client-facing digital marketing role, managing customer needs and delivering tailored solutions.
Proven ability to maintain social media channels and create engaging content.
Strong communication skills in English and Turkish; Dutch at A2 level and actively improving.
Team player with independent work capability, eager to learn and grow.
Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, with a polished appearance and genuine interest in jewelry.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with first commercial experience in client-facing roles, skilled in customer analysis, social media coordination, and content management. At Episto, I manage client relationships, analyze needs, and deliver tailored solutions. On my own project (mirook.com), I handle full-site management including social media integration. Comfortable working independently and as part of a team, with a genuine interest in jewelry and a polished appearance. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & communication: client needs analysis, customer reception, complaint handling, social media content & integration
- Commercial & administrative: order processing, invoice preparation, follow-up on repairs
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
